reviews.review_msg: Do not take this course as a gpa booster. Course was based on 1 paper, a midterm, and the final. Rubric for any assessments and tests were very unclear. The tutorials were unhelpful and unrelated to lecture material. This was supposed to be an elective but turned out to be my worst mark this semester.

He gives pretty good feedback, however, he never provides solid criteria for the papers. The lectures were quite lengthy and got boring at times, but his humour makes it a bit entertaining. Would not take a class with him ever again though. Easy class to BS through.

I usually don't leave horrible reviews. Granted, his lectures were average and his readings weren't terrible. But he was a disaster at marking. I ended up going to the Department Chair because he failed to hand me back any of my grades for the five course components, and didn't respond to any of my emails. I still never got a final grade from him.
